**Plan adjustment:** The vault strongly confirms the architecture to use:
- DI everywhere: `BookmarkStore` interface, injected `io.Writer`, injected browser-open func (no `exec.Command` in core)
- Multi-file layout: types, store, core, main
- Sentinel errors with `%w`, no global state
- `MemStore` + table-driven tests, stdlib-only, hand-rolled dispatch map

ASSISTANT: 19/19 tests pass, clean build, all commands work end-to-end. Here's what was built:

**Files:**
- `bookmark.go` — `Bookmark` struct, `ErrNotFound`/`ErrDuplicateID` sentinel errors
- `store.go` — `BookmarkStore` interface, `FileStore` (XDG data dir, atomic writes via temp+rename), `DataDir()`
- `core.go` — `App` struct with injected store/writer/clock/openURL; pure business logic for add/list/search/delete/tag/rename/open
- `main.go` — hand-rolled dispatch map, command handlers with `flag.FlagSet`, `openInBrowser` (platform-aware)
- `core_test.go` — `MemStore`, `fakeClock`, `newTestApp` helper; table-driven tests with no real files or wall clock

**Commands:** `add`, `list [--tag]`, `search`, `delete`, `tag`, `rename`, `open`, `help` — defaults to `list` when run with no args.
